founders: Jesse Zhang (CEO & Co-Founder), Ashwin Sreenivas (CTO & Co-Founder)
totalRaisedNote: ~$481M cumulative across Seed through Series D plus tender. Sacra company page, as of Jan 2026.
stage: Series D (post-money $4.5B); completed first employee tender offer at the same $4.5B mark in Mar 2026
revenue: ~$35M annualized revenue as of Oct 2025 (Sacra estimate), up from ~$10M ARR at end of 2024
runRate: ~$35M (Oct 2025, Sacra). Q3 2025 GAAP revenue and ARR each grew >3x YoY.
revenueGrowth: ~3x+ YoY (Q3 2025 GAAP revenue and ARR each grew more than 3x YoY per Sacra); ARR ~2.5x from ~$10M (end-2024) to ~$35M (Oct 2025)

ipoReadiness: Not IPO-ready near term. At ~$35M ARR (Oct 2025) against a $4.5B private mark (~129x trailing run-rate), Decagon is scaling fast (3x+ YoY) but still an order of magnitude below the typical $200M-$500M+ ARR threshold for a software IPO. Even at sustained triple-digit growth, a realistic public-market window is likely 3-5+ years out; expect further private rounds first. Heavily VC-funded with strong growth-stage backers (Coatue, Index, a16z, Accel), so no funding pressure forcing an early listing.

freshnessNote: All figures are private marks/estimates, NOT live trading data (no public ticker). Valuation $4.5B and 300+ employees confirmed via Bloomberg + TechCrunch (Jan-Mar 2026). ARR/revenue figures are Sacra estimates as of the dates noted (YE 2024 ~$10M; Oct 2025 ~$35M) — directional, not company-disclosed. Note: a June 2026 The Information headline references talks to raise at a $4B valuation, but the already-closed Jan 2026 Series D priced the company higher at $4.5B, which is used here as the last confirmed mark. Comp valuations are each company's last-round mark on differing dates (expected for a private peer set).
